name: United States
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth 2.5%, debt/GDP IMF WEO 2023. SIPRI 2023: mil spend 3.4% GDP. Trade openness WB 2023. Stability est. from WB Governance Indicators (political instability -0.5 → ~58). Energy: EIA 2023 (net exporter since 2019, ~88). Tech: CHIPS Act beneficiary, leading AI/semi capacity ~92. Reserves low by global standards (deep FX markets). Immigration: Census/DHS 2023 est. (Canada excluded from partner list — absorbed into MEX/EUR totals)

name: China
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth 5.2%. IMF WEO 2023: debt/GDP ~83% (incl. local govt). SIPRI 2023: mil spend est. 1.7% GDP. Trade openness WB 2023 (goods+services/GDP). Stability: WB governance ~62 (strong central control, social credit, Xinjiang tensions). Energy: IEA 2023 (large coal self-sufficiency, oil importer ~72). Tech: SMIC/Huawei progress but lagging on 3nm+, est. ~68. Reserves: ~$3.2T = ~18mo import cover.

name: European Union
notes: WB 2023: EU27 GDP growth ~0.5% (Germany -0.3%, avg drag). IMF WEO 2023: debt ~91% pop-weighted. SIPRI 2023: mil ~1.8% avg (France 2.1%, Germany 1.6%). Trade openness high (single market + customs union). Stability: ~68 pop-weighted (Poland tensions, Hungary autocracy drag). Energy: IEA 2023 post-Ukraine shock, ~42% self-sufficient (shifted from Russian gas). Tech: ASML, SAP, STMicro — est. ~62. Immigration: 2022-2023 Ukrainian refugee influx ~+3.8/1000.

name: Russia
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth ~3.6% (wartime fiscal stimulus overstates). IMF WEO 2023: low debt ~21% (sanctions/isolation limit borrowing). SIPRI 2023: mil ~6.9% GDP (Ukraine war). Trade openness collapsed post-2022 sanctions. Stability: ~40 (wartime repression, opposition suppression, mass emigration). Energy: IEA 2023 major oil/gas exporter ~98. Tech: brain drain, chip sanctions, ~38. Reserves: ~$600B nominal but $300B frozen; usable ~14mo. Inflation: CBR est. 2023.

name: India
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth 8.2% (fastest major economy). IMF WEO 2023: fiscal debt ~83% incl. states. SIPRI 2023: mil 2.4% GDP. Trade openness moderate (protective tariffs). Stability: ~55 (strong centre but Hindu nationalism tensions, Northeast conflicts, Kashmir). Energy: IEA 2023 coal self-sufficiency, oil importer ~58. Tech: IT services leader, nascent semi policy (India CHIPS); est. ~52. Reserves: ~$600B ≈ 11mo. Non-aligned heritage but Quad member.

name: Japan
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth 1.9%. IMF WEO 2023: debt/GDP ~255% (domestic-held JGBs, BoJ monetisation). SIPRI 2023: mil 1.6% (rising; new 5-yr defence buildup). Trade openness WB 2023. Stability: ~80 (rule of law, low crime, aging population demographic drag). Energy: IEA 2023 heavily import-dependent, nuclear slowly returning ~12. Tech: TSMC Kumamoto plant, Tokyo Electron, Sony semi ~75. Reserves: ~$1.3T ≈ 22mo. Quad member.

name: South Korea
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth 1.4% (export slump). IMF WEO 2023: debt ~54% GDP. SIPRI 2023: mil 2.8% GDP (DPRK threat). Trade openness very high (Korea FTAs with US, EU, China). Stability: ~68 (martial law crisis Dec 2023 noted; otherwise strong institutions). Energy: IEA 2023 heavily import-dependent ~14. Tech: Samsung/SK Hynix DRAM, memory leader; HBM/NAND ~80. Reserves: ~$420B ≈ 10mo.

name: ASEAN Bloc
notes: Population-weighted avg of Indonesia, Vietnam, Thailand, Philippines, Malaysia, Singapore. WB 2023: GDP growth ~4.5% avg. IMF WEO 2023: debt ~58% avg. SIPRI 2023: mil ~1.9% avg. Trade openness: Singapore high, others moderate — avg ~82. Stability: pop-weighted ~52 (Singapore high, Myanmar low, Philippines moderate). Energy: IEA 2023 Indonesia coal exporter, Singapore importer — avg ~55. Tech: chip assembly/packaging hub but limited design ~38. ASEAN non-alignment between US/China.

name: Brazil
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth 2.9% (above expectations; agri boom). IMF WEO 2023: gross debt ~88% GDP. SIPRI 2023: mil 1.5% GDP. Trade openness low (historically protectionist Mercosur). Stability: ~48 (Lula return, political polarisation, deforestation/Amazon politics). Energy: IEA 2023 Petrobras oil, large hydro, ethanol — ~86 (net exporter). Tech: limited semi capability ~30. Reserves: ~$350B ≈ 16mo. Non-aligned, BRICS member.

name: Gulf States (Saudi/UAE/Qatar)
notes: Population-weighted avg of Saudi Arabia, UAE, Qatar. WB 2023: Saudi GDP growth ~0.8% (OPEC+ cuts; UAE higher ~3.4%). IMF WEO 2023: debt ~26% GDP avg (Saudi ~26, UAE ~29, Qatar ~44). SIPRI 2023: mil ~5.8% pop-weighted (Saudi 7.1%, UAE 4.1%). Stability: ~58 (authoritarian but stable; Yemen conflict drag on Saudi). Energy: IEA 2023 major hydrocarbon exporters ~99. Tech: low domestic capability ~22 (major AI investment aspirations). Reserves: SAMA+ADIA+QIA sovereign wealth = ~$2.5T; import cover ~30mo.

name: Turkey
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth 4.5% (strong but inflation-distorted). IMF WEO 2023: debt ~38% GDP. SIPRI 2023: mil 2.4%. Trade openness: customs union with EU, moderate overall. Stability: ~42 (Erdogan consolidation, Kurdish conflict, post-earthquake reconstruction, refugee burden). Energy: IEA 2023 high import dependence ~28 (gas from Russia/Azerbaijan). Tech: BAYKAR drones, Aselsan — limited semi ~32. Reserves: CBRT ~$120B gross, net reserves very low ~4.5mo. NATO member but strategic autonomy posture. Inflation: CBRT 2023 actual.

name: United Kingdom
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth 0.1% (near stagnation; Brexit drag, cost-of-living crisis). IMF WEO 2023: debt ~100% GDP. SIPRI 2023: mil 2.3%. Trade openness: post-Brexit adjustment. Stability: ~62 (two PM changes 2022, Northern Ireland tensions, Scottish independence pressure; stable institutions overall). Energy: IEA 2023 North Sea production ~55 (declining but LNG imports growing). Tech: ARM, DeepMind, Rolls-Royce — est. ~58. Five Eyes core. Inflation: ONS 2023.

name: Australia
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth 2.0% (strong immigration offsetting per-capita slowdown). IMF WEO 2023: net debt ~52% GDP. SIPRI 2023: mil 2.0% GDP (AUKUS spending ramp). Trade openness moderate. Stability: ~76 (mature democracy, strong institutions, Albanese moderate stability). Energy: IEA 2023 coal/LNG/renewables exporter ~92. Tech: limited domestic semi ~35 (AUKUS cyber). Five Eyes + Quad member. Reserves: ~$60B ≈ 6mo. Immigration: record net arrivals 2023 ~+500k.

name: Mexico
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth 3.2% (nearshoring boom from US-China decoupling). IMF WEO 2023: debt ~54% GDP. SIPRI 2023: mil 0.8% (low; security dominated by cartels not conventional). Trade openness: USMCA-driven ~72. Stability: ~38 (cartel violence, high homicide rate, weak rule of law in regions; institutional stability moderate). Energy: IEA 2023 Pemex oil + renewables ~74. Tech: maquiladora assembly, limited R&D ~22. Reserves: ~$210B ≈ 5.5mo. Banxico 2023: inflation.

name: Nigeria
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth 2.9% (below population growth ~3.2%, per capita decline). IMF WEO 2023: debt ~38% GDP. SIPRI 2023: mil 0.7% GDP. Trade openness low (import substitution, forex controls). Stability: ~30 (Boko Haram/ISWAP, Biafra tensions, banditry, subsidy removal protests). Energy: IEA 2023 oil exporter, refinery dysfunction, fuel importer paradox ~78 gross production. Tech: fintech leader (Flutterwave etc.) but zero semi ~12. Reserves: CBN ~$33B ≈ 5mo. Inflation: CBN 2023 (naira devaluation shock).

name: Iran
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth ~5% (disputed; sanctions distort). IMF WEO 2023: official debt low ~35% but sanctions-constrained. SIPRI 2023: mil ~3.8% GDP (est., opaque). Trade openness: heavily sanctioned, barter/gray trade ~28. Stability: ~32 (Mahsa Amini protests 2022-23, IRGC repression, brain drain). Energy: IEA 2023 oil/gas self-sufficient ~97, but refining capacity issues. Tech: some indigenous drone/missile capability, limited semi ~28. Reserves: limited FX access, estimate ~$16B usable ≈ 6mo (IMF est.). Inflation: CBI/SCI 2023 (rial devaluation).

name: Israel
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth ~2% (pre-Oct 7 est.; war significantly lowered H2). IMF WEO 2023: debt ~62% GDP. SIPRI 2023: mil 5.4% (rising sharply post-Oct 7 2023, full-year SIPRI estimate). Trade openness: hi-tech export economy. Stability: ~38 (Oct 7 Hamas attack, Gaza war, judicial overhaul protests, West Bank tensions). Energy: IEA 2023 Leviathan gas field — domestic gas sufficient ~68. Tech: Intel Haifa, TSMC customer, Check Point, Unit 8200 talent pipeline ~72. Reserves: BoI ~$200B ≈ 14mo. Diaspora bonds buffer.

name: Pakistan
notes: WB 2023: GDP growth ~2.1% (IMF bailout economy, floods 2022 drag). IMF WEO 2023: debt ~78% GDP. SIPRI 2023: mil ~4.0% GDP (nuclear posture). Trade openness low (CPEC debts). Stability: ~25 (PTI/Imran Khan protests, military-civilian tensions, Balochistan insurgency, TTP attacks). Energy: IEA 2023 import-dependent gas/oil, circular debt crisis ~38. Tech: limited capability ~14 (IT services diaspora but domestic semi zero). Reserves: SBP ~$8B ≈ 2.5mo import cover (critical shortage). SBP 2023: inflation peak.
